title: phalangium fragrans
intro: Phalangium fragrans, also known as the Sweet-scented Phalangium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phalangium fragrans include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting relaxation. The plant's aerial parts can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
